blurb_en: On April 5, Sam Altman told a podcast that Anthropic's decision to restrict access to Mythos was "clearly incredible marketing — you've built a bomb, and you're now selling the bomb shelter for $100 million." Nine days later, OpenAI launched Trusted Access for Cyber, a restricted application program for vetted defenders seeking access to GPT-5.5-Cyber. The model, it turns out, is nearly as good at finding software vulnerabilities as Mythos. Altman's analogy still applies; he just moved into the shelter.
blurb_zh: 4月5日，山姆·奥特曼在播客中嘲讽Anthropic限制Mythos访问：“这显然是顶级营销——你造了颗炸弹，还要卖100万美元一个的防空洞。”九天后，OpenAI推出了“网络可信访问计划”，同样要求申请者经过审核才能使用GPT-5.5-Cyber。这款模型在挖掘软件漏洞方面，竟与Mythos不相上下。奥特曼的比喻还是成立的——只是他自己也住进了防空洞。
verification_notes: TechCrunch April 30 confirmed restricted launch after Altman April 5 podcast quote. CNBC May 7 confirmed formal portal opening. Altman bomb-shelter quote verified across multiple sources (TechCrunch, CNBC, Axios, Benzinga).

blurb_en: When fans noticed the gatefold art on the new Riven vinyl soundtrack had a distinctly AI image look, composer Robyn Miller confirmed it: the image was created with AI tools and Photoshop. He spent weeks on it, he said, and designed it carefully. Fangamer, the publisher, said its internal policy prohibits generative AI art — suggesting the company didn't know. "Tools do not make the art. The artist makes the art," said the composer, directly into the irony.
blurb_zh: 粉丝发现《Riven》黑胶原声大碟折叠封面有浓浓AI味，直接去问了作曲家罗宾·米勒。米勒承认了：图片用AI工具和Photoshop创作，他花了数周时间，经过仔细设计。出版商Fangamer表示公司内部政策禁止AI生成美术作品——言下之意，他们事先不知情。米勒的回应是：“工具不创作艺术，艺术家才创作。”他就这样说进了这件事的讽刺核心。
verification_notes: Time Extension confirmed Miller's admission. PC Gamer independently covered Miller's defense quote. Fangamer AI policy statement quoted across both outlets. Story cross-referenced via Reddit community post cited in reporting.

blurb_en: Voice AI company ElevenLabs has some new celebrity panelists: BlackRock, NVIDIA, Santander, and Deutsche Telekom on the institutional side, and Jamie Foxx and Eva Longoria on the “call my manager” side. The third close of ElevenLabs’ Series D brings total fundraising above $550 million at an $11 billion valuation. The company also reported that it crossed $500 million in annual recurring revenue in Q1 2026, up from $350 million at year-end 2025. Six months ago it was worth $6.6 billion.
blurb_zh: 语音AI公司ElevenLabs迎来新一批投资者：机构方有贝莱德、英伟达、桑坦德和德意志电信，明星方有杰米·福克斯和伊娃·朗格利亚。系列D第三次交割完成，总融资额超5.5亿美元，估值110亿美元。公司同步宣布，2026年第一季度年度经常性收入突破5亿美元，较2025年末3.5亿美元大幅增长。半年前估值还是66亿，这个赛道，不缺观众。
verification_notes: TechCrunch May 5 confirmed investor list and ARR milestone. Music Business Worldwide and Tech.eu confirmed same facts independently. $550M+ total raise and $11B valuation cross-verified across all three outlets.

blurb_en: Google quietly retired Project Mariner on May 4, shutting down its experimental AI web-browsing agent with no announcement — users were simply redirected to Gemini Agent. The project ran for 17 months. Its technology has been absorbed into Gemini Agent and Chrome’s auto-browse features, which Google will presumably announce at I/O on May 19 as if they arrived fully formed. Seventeen months, a quiet redirect, and a conference keynote: the standard lifecycle.
blurb_zh: 谷歌5月4日悄然关闭了Project Mariner——这款实验性AI网页浏览代理运行了17个月，关闭时毫无公告，用户直接被跳转至Gemini Agent。其底层技术已被整合进Gemini Agent和Chrome的自动浏览功能，届时大概会在5月19日I/O大会上作为新品发布。十七个月、一次静默跳转、一场主题演讲——标准流程。
verification_notes: Android Authority, Android Headlines, and Digital Trends all confirmed May 4 shutdown date and technology absorption into Gemini Agent and Chrome. Multiple sources confirm no official announcement was made.

blurb_en: The final approval hearing for the $1.5 billion Bartz v. Anthropic copyright settlement is scheduled for May 14. The case covers 482,460 eligible works by authors who say Anthropic trained Claude on their books without permission. Of those, 91.3% have filed claims — roughly ten times the typical class action claim rate of around 10%. The authors are not letting this one go quietly.
blurb_zh: Anthropic版权集体诉讼和解案定于5月14日进行最终批准听证。本案覆盖482,460部作品，均为作者主张Anthropic未经授权用于训练Claude的书籍。其中91.3%的作品已提交索赔申请——而普通集体诉讼的索赔率通常仅为10%左右。这群作者，不打算安静地离场。
verification_notes: Authors Guild confirmed 91.3% claim rate and 482,460 eligible works. Authors Alliance confirmed May 14 hearing date (rescheduled from earlier date). Anthropic Copyright Settlement official site confirms key dates. $1.5B settlement amount confirmed via multiple legal publications.

blurb_en: OpenAI launched three new realtime audio models on May 7: GPT-Realtime-2 for live voice reasoning, GPT-Realtime-Translate for speech translation across 70 input languages in real time, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper for streaming transcription. The Realtime API also exited beta, making it officially production-grade for developers. The translation model keeps pace with the speaker and outputs in 13 languages. This is either very impressive or the beginning of the end of the language-learning industry, depending on your position.
blurb_zh: 5月7日，OpenAI推出三款实时语音API模型：GPT-Realtime-2（支持语音实时推理）、GPT-Realtime-Translate（支持70种输入语言实时翻译）和GPT-Realtime-Whisper（流式语音转文字）。Realtime API同步正式退出测试版，开发者可将其用于生产环境。翻译模型支持13种输出语言，与说话者语速保持同步。这要么非常厉害，要么是语言学习行业末日的开端，取决于你站哪边。
verification_notes: OpenAI official blog May 7 confirmed all three models. Notebookcheck and Analytics Drift independently covered the same release with matching details. Realtime API GA status confirmed via OpenAI blog.
